## Proposed solution

## Privacy check (required — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Requires no network traffic beyond the existing read-only IMAP session
- [ ] Persists no new message content (bodies, subjects, filenames, full URLs)
- [ ] Scoring stays deterministic and explainable (if scoring-related)
- [ ] Derived data remains rebuildable from fact tables
